javascript:(()%20%3D%3E%20%7B%20if%20(window.__chromeCap)%20%7B%20window.__chromeCap.toggle()%3B%20return%3B%20%7D%20const%20C%20%3D%20%7B%20bgApp%3A%20'%23FAF9F5'%2C%20bgPanel%3A%20'%23F5F4ED'%2C%20bgSurf%3A%20'%23FFFFFF'%2C%20bgHover%3A%20'rgba(15%2C12%2C8%2C0.04)'%2C%20bgMuted%3A%20'%23F0EEE6'%2C%20bdDef%3A%20'rgba(15%2C12%2C8%2C0.14)'%2C%20bdSub%3A%20'rgba(15%2C12%2C8%2C0.08)'%2C%20txPri%3A%20'rgba(15%2C12%2C8%2C0.92)'%2C%20txSec%3A%20'rgba(15%2C12%2C8%2C0.64)'%2C%20txTer%3A%20'rgba(15%2C12%2C8%2C0.60)'%2C%20accent%3A%20'%237C3AED'%2C%20accentHv%3A%20'%236D28D9'%2C%20accentAc%3A%20'%235B21B6'%2C%20shadow%3A%20'0%2010px%2015px%20rgba(20%2C20%2C19%2C0.08)%2C%200%204px%206px%20rgba(20%2C20%2C19%2C0.04)'%2C%20%7D%3B%20const%20FONT%20%3D%20%22'Inter'%2C-apple-system%2CBlinkMacSystemFont%2C'Segoe%20UI'%2Csans-serif%22%3B%20const%20captures%20%3D%20%5B%5D%3B%20let%20picking%20%3D%20false%3B%20let%20hoverEl%20%3D%20null%3B%20let%20captureMode%20%3D%20'all'%3B%20const%20el%20%3D%20(tag%2C%20css%2C%20txt)%20%3D%3E%20%7B%20const%20e%20%3D%20document.createElement(tag)%3B%20if%20(css)%20e.style.cssText%20%3D%20css%3B%20if%20(txt%20!%3D%20null)%20e.textContent%20%3D%20txt%3B%20return%20e%3B%20%7D%3B%20const%20HL_COLOR%20%3D%20'%23EF4444'%3B%20const%20hl%20%3D%20el('div'%2C%20'position%3Afixed%3Bpointer-events%3Anone%3Bz-index%3A2147483646%3B'%20%2B%20'border%3A2px%20solid%20'%20%2B%20HL_COLOR%20%2B%20'%3Bbackground%3Argba(239%2C68%2C68%2C.10)%3B'%20%2B%20'border-radius%3A3px%3Bbox-sizing%3Aborder-box%3Bdisplay%3Anone%3B'%20%2B%20'transition%3Aall%2040ms%20linear%3B')%3B%20const%20hlLabel%20%3D%20el('div'%2C%20'position%3Aabsolute%3Btop%3A-22px%3Bleft%3A0%3Bpadding%3A2px%207px%3B'%20%2B%20'background%3A'%20%2B%20HL_COLOR%20%2B%20'%3Bcolor%3A%23fff%3Bfont%3A11px%2F1.4%20'%20%2B%20FONT%20%2B%20'%3B'%20%2B%20'border-radius%3A4px%3Bwhite-space%3Anowrap%3Bfont-weight%3A500%3B')%3B%20hl.appendChild(hlLabel)%3B%20const%20panel%20%3D%20el('div'%2C%20'position%3Afixed%3Bbottom%3A20px%3Bright%3A20px%3Bwidth%3A340px%3B'%20%2B%20'z-index%3A2147483647%3Bbackground%3A'%20%2B%20C.bgSurf%20%2B%20'%3B'%20%2B%20'border%3A1px%20solid%20'%20%2B%20C.bdDef%20%2B%20'%3Bborder-radius%3A12px%3B'%20%2B%20'box-shadow%3A'%20%2B%20C.shadow%20%2B%20'%3Bfont%3A12px%2F1.4%20'%20%2B%20FONT%20%2B%20'%3B'%20%2B%20'color%3A'%20%2B%20C.txPri%20%2B%20'%3Boverflow%3Ahidden%3B')%3B%20const%20header%20%3D%20el('div'%2C%20'padding%3A12px%2014px%3Bborder-bottom%3A1px%20solid%20'%20%2B%20C.bdSub%20%2B%20'%3B'%20%2B%20'display%3Aflex%3Balign-items%3Acenter%3Bgap%3A10px%3B')%3B%20const%20dot%20%3D%20el('div'%2C%20'width%3A8px%3Bheight%3A8px%3Bborder-radius%3A50%25%3Bbackground%3A'%20%2B%20C.accent%20%2B%20'%3B'%20%2B%20'flex-shrink%3A0%3B')%3B%20const%20title%20%3D%20el('div'%2C%20'font-weight%3A600%3Bfont-size%3A13px%3Bflex%3A1%3B'%2C%20'Chrome%20Capture')%3B%20const%20closeBtn%20%3D%20el('button'%2C%20'width%3A22px%3Bheight%3A22px%3Bborder%3A0%3Bborder-radius%3A5px%3Bbackground%3Atransparent%3B'%20%2B%20'color%3A'%20%2B%20C.txTer%20%2B%20'%3Bcursor%3Apointer%3Bfont%3A14px%2F1%20'%20%2B%20FONT%20%2B%20'%3Bpadding%3A0%3B'%2C%20'%5Cu2715')%3B%20closeBtn.onmouseenter%20%3D%20()%20%3D%3E%20closeBtn.style.background%20%3D%20C.bgHover%3B%20closeBtn.onmouseleave%20%3D%20()%20%3D%3E%20closeBtn.style.background%20%3D%20'transparent'%3B%20const%20modeBtn%20%3D%20el('button'%2C%20'padding%3A2px%208px%3Bborder%3A1px%20solid%20'%20%2B%20C.bdDef%20%2B%20'%3Bborder-radius%3A5px%3B'%20%2B%20'background%3A'%20%2B%20C.bgPanel%20%2B%20'%3Bcolor%3A'%20%2B%20C.txSec%20%2B%20'%3Bcursor%3Apointer%3B'%20%2B%20'font%3A10px%2F1.4%20'%20%2B%20FONT%20%2B%20'%3Bwhite-space%3Anowrap%3B')%3B%20modeBtn.textContent%20%3D%20'all'%3B%20modeBtn.title%20%3D%20'Toggle%20capture%20mode%3A%20all%20%2F%20structure%20(no%20text%2C%20simplified%20SVG)'%3B%20modeBtn.onclick%20%3D%20()%20%3D%3E%20%7B%20captureMode%20%3D%20captureMode%20%3D%3D%3D%20'all'%20%3F%20'structure'%20%3A%20'all'%3B%20modeBtn.textContent%20%3D%20captu ms%3Acenter%3Bgap%3A5px%3B')%3B%20const%20SVG_NS%20%3D%20'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%3B%20const%20arrow%20%3D%20document.createElementNS(SVG_NS%2C%20'svg')%3B%20arrow.setAttribute('width'%2C%20'12')%3B%20arrow.setAttribute('height'%2C%20'12')%3B%20arrow.setAttribute('viewBox'%2C%20'0%200%2016%2016')%3B%20arrow.setAttribute('fill'%2C%20'currentColor')%3B%20const%20arrowP%20%3D%20document.createElementNS(SVG_NS%2C%20'path')%3B%20arrowP.setAttribute('d'%2C%20'M8%201L3%206h3v6h4V6h3L8%201z')%3B%20arrowP.setAttribute('transform'%2C%20'rotate(180%208%208)')%3B%20arrow.appendChild(arrowP)%3B%20pasteHint.append(arrow%2C%20'Paste%20into%20Claude%20Code%20or%20any%20LLM')%3B%20const%20pickBtn%20%3D%20mkBtn('Stop%20picking'%2C%20false)%3B%20pickBtn.style.width%20%3D%20'100%25'%3B%20body.append(hint%2C%20list%2C%20outRow%2C%20pasteHint%2C%20pickBtn)%3B%20panel.append(header%2C%20body)%3B%20function%20mkBtn(label%2C%20primary)%20%7B%20const%20b%20%3D%20el('button'%2C%20'padding%3A7px%2014px%3Bborder-radius%3A8px%3Bfont%3A12px%2F1%20'%20%2B%20FONT%20%2B%20'%3B'%20%2B%20'font-weight%3A500%3Bcursor%3Apointer%3Btransition%3Aall%20.12s%20ease%3B'%20%2B%20'border%3A1px%20solid%20'%20%2B%20(primary%20%3F%20'rgba(0%2C0%2C0%2C.15)'%20%3A%20C.bdDef)%20%2B%20'%3B'%20%2B%20'background%3A'%20%2B%20(primary%20%3F%20C.accent%20%3A%20C.bgSurf)%20%2B%20'%3B'%20%2B%20'color%3A'%20%2B%20(primary%20%3F%20'%23FAF9F5'%20%3A%20C.txPri)%20%2B%20'%3B'%20%2B%20(primary%20%3F%20'box-shadow%3A0%201px%203px%20rgba(91%2C33%2C182%2C.35)%2Cinset%200%201px%200%20rgba(255%2C255%2C255%2C.15)%3B'%20%3A%20'')%2C%20label)%3B%20b.onmouseenter%20%3D%20()%20%3D%3E%20b.style.background%20%3D%20primary%20%3F%20C.accentHv%20%3A%20C.bgHover%3B%20b.onmouseleave%20%3D%20()%20%3D%3E%20b.style.background%20%3D%20primary%20%3F%20C.accent%20%3A%20C.bgSurf%3B%20b.onmousedown%20%3D%20()%20%3D%3E%20b.style.background%20%3D%20primary%20%3F%20C.accentAc%20%3A%20C.bgMuted%3B%20b.onmouseup%20%3D%20()%20%3D%3E%20b.style.background%20%3D%20primary%20%3F%20C.accentHv%20%3A%20C.bgHover%3B%20return%20b%3B%20%7D%20const%20PSEUDO_RE%20%3D%20%2F%3A(hover%7Cfocus%7Cfocus-within%7Cfocus-visible%7Cactive%7Cvisited%7Cdisabled%7Cchecked%7Cenabled%7Cread-only%7Cplaceholder-shown%7Cinvalid%7Cvalid%7Crequired)(%3F!%5B-(%5D)%2Fg%3B%20function%20matchesWithPseudo(target%2C%20selectorText)%20%7B%20try%20%7B%20if%20(target.matches(selectorText))%20return%20%7B%20match%3A%20true%20%7D%3B%20%7D%20catch%20%7B%7D%20if%20(PSEUDO_RE.test(selectorText))%20%7B%20PSEUDO_RE.lastIndex%20%3D%200%3B%20const%20stripped%20%3D%20selectorText.replace(PSEUDO_RE%2C%20'').replace(%2F%3A%3A%3F%24%2Fg%2C%20'')%3B%20if%20(!stripped)%20return%20%7B%20match%3A%20false%20%7D%3B%20try%20%7B%20if%20(target.matches(stripped))%20%7B%20const%20pseudos%20%3D%20%5B%5D%3B%20let%20m%3B%20PSEUDO_RE.lastIndex%20%3D%200%3B%20while%20((m%20%3D%20PSEUDO_RE.exec(selectorText)))%20pseudos.push(m%5B1%5D)%3B%20return%20%7B%20match%3A%20true%2C%20states%3A%20pseudos%20%7D%3B%20%7D%20%7D%20catch%20%7B%7D%20%7D%20return%20%7B%20match%3A%20false%20%7D%3B%20%7D%20function%20walkRules(rules%2C%20target%2C%20acc%2C%20media)%20%7B%20for%20(const%20r%20of%20rules)%20%7B%20try%20%7B%20if%20(r.selectorText)%20%7B%20const%20res%20%3D%20matchesWithPseudo(target%2C%20r.selectorText)%3B%20if%20(res.match)%20%7B%20const%20entry%20%3D%20%7B%20selector%3A%20r.selectorText%2C%20css%3A%20r.style.cssText%20%7D%3B%20if%20(media)%20entry.media%20%3D%20media%3B%20if%20(res.states)%20entry.states%20%3D%20res.states%3B%20acc.push(entry)%3B%20%7D%20%7D%20if%20(r.styleSheet)%20%7B%20walkRules(r.styleSheet.cssRules%2C%20target%2C%20acc%2C%20(r.media%20%26%26%20r.media.mediaText)%20%7C%7C%20media)%3B%20%7D%20else%20if%20(r.cssRules)%20%7B%20walkRules(r.cssRules%2C%20target%2C%20acc%2C%20r.conditionText%20%7C%7C%20(r.media%20%26%26%20r.media.mediaText)%20%7C%7C%20media)%3B%20%7D%20%7D%20catch%20%7B%7D%20%7D%20%7D%20function%20isJunkRule(selector%2C%20css%2C%20media)%20%7B%20const%20sel%20%3D%20selector.replace(%2F%5Cs%2B%2Fg%2C%20'%20').trim()%3B%20if%20(%2F%5E%5C*(%5Cs*%2C%5Cs*(%3A%3A%3F%5Cw%2B))*%24%2F.test(sel))%20return%20true%3B%20if%20(%2F%5E(--.%2B%3F%3A%5Cs*%5B%5E%3B%5D*%3B%5Cs*)%2B%24%2F.test(css)%20%26%26%20!css.replace(%2F--%5B%5Cw-%5D%2B%3A%5Cs*%5B%5E%3B%5D*%3B%3F%5Cs*%2Fg%2C%20'').trim())%20return%20true%3B%20if%20(media%20%26%26%20%2Fprefers-reduced-motion%2F.test(media))%20return%20true%3B%20return%20false%3B%20%7D%20let%20_corsFixed%20%3D%20false%3B%20async%20function%20fixCorsSheets()%20%7B%20if%20(_corsFixed)%20return%3B%20_corsFixed%20%3D%20true%3B%20const%20fetches%20%3D%20%5B%5D%3B%20for%20(const%20sh%20of%20document.styleSheets)%20%7B%20try%20%7B%20sh.cssRules%3B%20continue%3B%20%7D%20catch%20%7B%7D%20if%20(!sh.href)%20continue%3B%20fetches.push(%20fetch(sh.href).then(r%20%3D%3E%20r.text()).then(css%20%3D%3E%20%7B%20const%20s%20%3D%20document.createElement('style')%3B%20s.dataset.chromecap%20%3D%20'1'%3B%20s.textContent%20%3D%20css%3B%20document.head.appendChild(s)%3B%20%7D).catch(()%20%3D%3E%20%7B%7D)%20)%3B%20%7D%20await%20Promise.all(fetches)%3B%20%7D%20function%20resolveVars(cssText%2C%20target)%20%7B%20const%20root%20%3D%20getComputedStyle(document.documentElement)%3B%20const%20elCS%20%3D%20getComputedStyle(target)%3B%20return%20cssText.replace(%2Fvar%5C(--%5B%5Cw-%5D%2B(%3F%3A%5Cs*%2C%5Cs*%5B%5E)%5D%2B)%3F%5C)%2Fg%2C%20m%20%3D%3E%20%7B%20const%20name%20%3D%20m.match(%2Fvar%5C((--%5B%5Cw-%5D%2B)%2F)%5B1%5D%3B%20const%20val%20%3D%20elCS.getPropertyValue(name).trim()%20%7C%7C%20root.getPropertyValue(name).trim()%3B%20return%20val%20%3F%20val%20%3A%20m%3B%20%7D)%3B%20%7D%20function%20getRules(target)%20%7B%20const%20acc%20%3D%20%5B%5D%3B%20const%20seen%20%3D%20new%20Set()%3B%20for%20(const%20sh%20of%20document.styleSheets)%20%7B%20let%20rules%3B%20try%20%7B%20rules%20%3D%20sh.cssRules%3B%20%7D%20catch%20%7B%20continue%3B%20%7D%20walkRules(rules%2C%20target%2C%20acc%2C%20(sh.media%20%26%26%20sh.media.mediaText)%20%7C%7C%20undefined)%3B%20%7D%20return%20acc.filter(r%20%3D%3E%20%7B%20if%20(isJunkRule(r.selector%2C%20r.css%2C%20r.media))%20return%20false%3B%20const%20key%20%3D%20r.selector%20%2B%20'%7C'%20%2B%20r.css%20%2B%20'%7C'%20%2B%20(r.media%20%7C%7C%20'')%3B%20if%20(seen.has(key))%20return%20false%3B%20seen.add(key)%3B%20return%20true%3B%20%7D).map(r%20%3D%3E%20%7B%20if%20(r.css.includes('var(--'))%20%7B%20r.cssResolved%20%3D%20resolveVars(r.css%2C%20target)%3B%20%7D%20return%20r%3B%20%7D)%3B%20%7D%20const%20PROPS%20%3D%20%5B%20'display'%2C'position'%2C'top'%2C'right'%2C'bottom'%2C'left'%2C'width'%2C'height'%2C%20'margin'%2C'padding'%2C'border'%2C'border-radius'%2C'box-sizing'%2C'box-shadow'%2C%20'background'%2C'color'%2C'opacity'%2C%20'font-family'%2C'font-size'%2C'font-weight'%2C'font-style'%2C'line-height'%2C%20'letter-spacing'%2C'text-align'%2C'text-decoration'%2C'text-transform'%2C'white-space'%2C%20'flex'%2C'flex-direction'%2C'flex-wrap'%2C'justify-content'%2C'align-items'%2C'align-self'%2C'gap'%2C%20'grid-template-columns'%2C'grid-template-rows'%2C'grid-column'%2C'grid-row'%2C%20'overflow'%2C'z-index'%2C'transform'%2C'transition'%2C'cursor'%2C'object-fit'%2C%20%5D%3B%20const%20DEFAULTS%20%3D%20%7B%20'display'%3A'inline'%2C'position'%3A'static'%2C'top'%3A'auto'%2C'right'%3A'auto'%2C'bottom'%3A'auto'%2C'left'%3A'auto'%2C%20'width'%3A'auto'%2C'height'%3A'auto'%2C'margin'%3A'0px'%2C'padding'%3A'0px'%2C'border'%3A'0px%20none%20rgb(0%2C%200%2C%200)'%2C%20'border-radius'%3A'0px'%2C'box-sizing'%3A'content-box'%2C'box-shadow'%3A'none'%2C%20'color'%3A'rgb(0%2C%200%2C%200)'%2C'opacity'%3A'1'%2C'font-style'%3A'normal'%2C'font-weight'%3A'400'%2C%20'letter-spacing'%3A'normal'%2C'text-align'%3A'start'%2C'text-decoration'%3A'none%20solid%20rgb(0%2C%200%2C%200)'%2C%20'text-transform'%3A'none'%2C'white-space'%3A'normal'%2C'flex'%3A'0%201%20auto'%2C'flex-direction'%3A'row'%2C%20'flex-wrap'%3A'nowrap'%2C'justify-content'%3A'normal'%2C'align-items'%3A'normal'%2C'align-self'%3A'auto'%2C%2 arget)%3B%20const%20families%20%3D%20cs.fontFamily.split('%2C').map(f%20%3D%3E%20f.trim().replace(%2F%5E%5B%5Cx22%5Cx27%5D%7C%5B%5Cx22%5Cx27%5D%24%2Fg%2C%20''))%3B%20const%20loaded%20%3D%20%5B%5D%3B%20document.fonts.forEach(f%20%3D%3E%20%7B%20if%20(f.status%20%3D%3D%3D%20'loaded'%20%26%26%20families.some(fam%20%3D%3E%20fam.toLowerCase()%20%3D%3D%3D%20f.family.toLowerCase()))%20%7B%20const%20entry%20%3D%20f.family%3B%20if%20(!loaded.includes(entry))%20loaded.push(entry)%3B%20%7D%20%7D)%3B%20return%20loaded.length%20%3F%20loaded%20%3A%20undefined%3B%20%7D%20function%20selApprox(target)%20%7B%20const%20tag%20%3D%20target.tagName.toLowerCase()%3B%20if%20(target.id)%20return%20tag%20%2B%20'%23'%20%2B%20target.id%3B%20const%20cls%20%3D%20(target.getAttribute('class')%20%7C%7C%20'').trim().split(%2F%5Cs%2B%2F).filter(Boolean)%5B0%5D%3B%20return%20cls%20%3F%20tag%20%2B%20'.'%20%2B%20cls%20%3A%20tag%3B%20%7D%20const%20TRACKER_RE%20%3D%20%2F%5Edata-(ad%7Cgoogle%7Cadsbygoogle%7Cload-complete%7Cgtm%7Cfb%5B-p%5D%3F%7Canalytics%7Ctrack%7Cevent%7Csegment%7Camplitude%7Camp%7Cmp%7Cmixpanel%7Chj%7Chotjar%7Cheap%7Cintercom%7Cpendo%7Cclarity%7Cga4%3F)(-%7C%24)%2F%3B%20const%20SVG_INLINE_MAX%20%3D%20500%3B%20function%20cleanHTML(el)%20%7B%20const%20clone%20%3D%20el.cloneNode(true)%3B%20clone.querySelectorAll(%20'script%2C%20iframe%2C%20noscript%2C%20ins.adsbygoogle%2C%20%5Bdata-ad-client%5D%2C%20'%20%2B%20'%5Bdata-google-container-id%5D%2C%20%5Bdata-sender%5D%2C%20.resize-sensor%2C%20'%20%2B%20'style%3Anot(%5Bdata-chromecap%5D)'%20).forEach(n%20%3D%3E%20n.remove())%3B%20clone.querySelectorAll('%5Bstyle*%3D%22z-index%3A%202147483647%22%5D%2C%20%5Bstyle*%3D%22z-index%3A2147483647%22%5D%2C%20%5Bstyle*%3D%22z-index%3A%202147483646%22%5D%2C%20%5Bstyle*%3D%22z-index%3A2147483646%22%5D').forEach(n%20%3D%3E%20n.remove())%3B%20clone.querySelectorAll('astro-island%5Bprops%5D%2C%20%5Bdata-island-props%5D').forEach(n%20%3D%3E%20%7B%20n.removeAttribute('props')%3B%20n.removeAttribute('data-island-props')%3B%20%7D)%3B%20const%20FW_RE%20%3D%20%2F%5E(data-astro-cid%7Cdata-astro-source%7Cdata-v-%7Cdata-hk%7Cdata-svelte%7Cdata-sveltekit%7Cdata-reactid%7Cdata-reactroot%7Cdata-server-rendered%7Cdata-fetch-key%7Cdata-hydrate%7Cdata-ssr%7Cdata-lit%7Cdata-nscript%7C_ng%7Cng-reflect)%2F%3B%20clone.querySelectorAll('*').forEach(n%20%3D%3E%20%7B%20for%20(const%20attr%20of%20%5B...n.attributes%5D)%20%7B%20if%20(attr.name.startsWith('on')%20%7C%7C%20TRACKER_RE.test(attr.name)%20%7C%7C%20FW_RE.test(attr.name))%20%7B%20n.removeAttribute(attr.name)%3B%20%7D%20%7D%20%7D)%3B%20clone.style.cssText%20%3D%20'position%3Afixed%3Btop%3A-9999px%3Bleft%3A-9999px%3Bopacity%3A0%3Bpointer-events%3Anone%3B'%3B%20document.body.appendChild(clone)%3B%20const%20cleanText%20%3D%20clone.innerText%20%7C%7C%20''%3B%20clone.remove()%3B%20clone.style.cssText%20%3D%20''%3B%20if%20(captureMode%20%3D%3D%3D%20'structure')%20%7B%20clone.querySelectorAll('svg').forEach(svg%20%3D%3E%20%7B%20if%20(svg.querySelector('use'))%20return%3B%20if%20(svg.outerHTML.length%20%3E%20SVG_INLINE_MAX)%20%7B%20const%20ph%20%3D%20document.createElementNS('http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%2C%20'svg')%3B%20for%20(const%20a%20of%20%5B'width'%2C%20'height'%2C%20'viewBox'%2C%20'class'%2C%20'aria-label'%2C%20'aria-hidden'%5D)%20%7B%20if%20(svg.getAttribute(a))%20ph.setAttribute(a%2C%20svg.getAttribute(a))%3B%20%7D%20ph.setAttribute('data-placeholder'%2C%20'svg')%3B%20svg.replaceWith(ph)%3B%20%7D%20%7D)%3B%20const%20walker%20%3D%20document.createTreeWalker(clone%2C%20NodeFilter.SHOW_TEXT)%3B%20const%20textNodes%20%3D%20%5B%5D%3B%20while%20(walker.nextNode())%20textNodes.push(walker.currentNode)%3B%20textNodes.forEach(n%20%3D%3E%20n.remove())%3B%20%7D%20const%20html%20%3D%20clone.outerHTML.replace(%2F%3C!--%5B%5Cs%5CS%5D*%3F--%3E%2Fg%2C%20'')%3B%20return%20%7B%20html%2C%20innerText%3A%20cleanText%20%7D%3B%20%7D%20function%20detectFrameworks()%20%7B%20const%20fw%20%3D%20%5B%5D%3B%20const%20check%20%3D%20(cond%2C%20name)%20%3D%3E%20%7B%20try%20%7B%20if%20(cond())%20fw.push(name)%3B%20%7D%20catch%20%7B%7D%20%7D%3B%20check(()%20%3D%3E%20window.__VUE__%20%7C%7C%20window.__vue_app__%20%7C%7C%20window.__VUE_DEVTOOLS_GLOBAL_HOOK__%20%7C%7C%20document.querySelector('%5Bdata-v-app%5D')%2C%20'Vue')%3B%20check(()%20%3D%3E%20window.__REACT_DEVTOOLS_GLOBAL_HOOK__%20%7C%7C%20document.querySelector('%5Bdata-reactroot%5D')%20%7C%7C%20document.querySelector('%5Bdata-reactid%5D')%2C%20'React')%3B%20check(()%20%3D%3E%20window.__NEXT_DATA__%20%7C%7C%20document.querySelector('%23__next')%2C%20'Next.js')%3B%20check(()%20%3D%3E%20window.__NUXT__%20%7C%7C%20document.querySelector('%23__nuxt')%2C%20'Nuxt')%3B%20check(()%20%3D%3E%20window.ng%20%7C%7C%20document.querySelector('%5Bng-version%5D')%20%7C%7C%20document.querySelector('%5B_nghost%5D')%20%7C%7C%20document.querySelector('%5B_ngcontent%5D')%2C%20'Angular')%3B%20check(()%20%3D%3E%20document.querySelector('%5Bclass*%3D%22svelte-%22%5D')%2C%20'Svelte')%3B%20check(()%20%3D%3E%20window.jQuery%20%7C%7C%20window.%24%3F.fn%3F.jquery%2C%20'jQuery')%3B%20check(()%20%3D%3E%20document.querySelector('%5Bclass*%3D%22tw-%22%5D')%20%7C%7C%20document.querySelector('style%5Bdata-tw%5D')%20%7C%7C%20%5B...document.styleSheets%5D.some(s%20%3D%3E%20%7B%20try%20%7B%20return%20%5B...s.cssRules%5D.some(r%20%3D%3E%20r.selectorText%20%26%26%20%2F%5E%5C.%5C!%3F-%3F(%3F%3Asm%7Cmd%7Clg%7Cxl%7C2xl)%3A%2F.test(r.selectorText))%3B%20%7D%20catch%20%7B%20return%20false%3B%20%7D%20%7D)%2C%20'Tailwind')%3B%20check(()%20%3D%3E%20%5B...document.styleSheets%5D.some(s%20%3D%3E%20%7B%20try%20%7B%20return%20%5B...s.cssRules%5D.some(r%20%3D%3E%20r.selectorText%20%26%26%20%2F%5E%5C.col-md-%5Cd%2B%24%2F.test(r.selectorText))%3B%20%7D%20catch%20%7B%20return%20false%3B%20%7D%20%7D)%20%7C%7C%20(document.querySelector('.container-fluid')%20%26%26%20document.querySelector('.row')%20%26%26%20document.querySelector('%5Bclass%5E%3D%22col-%22%5D'))%2C%20'Bootstrap')%3B%20return%20fw.length%20%3F%20fw%20%3A%20undefined%3B%20%7D%20function%20getAccessibleName(el)%20%7B%20const%20lblBy%20%3D%20el.getAttribute('aria-labelledby')%3B%20if%20(lblBy)%20%7B%20const%20txt%20%3D%20lblBy.split(%2F%5Cs%2B%2F).map(id%20%3D%3E%20%7B%20const%20ref%20%3D%20document.getElementById(id)%3B%20return%20ref%20%3F%20ref.textContent.trim()%20%3A%20''%3B%20%7D).filter(Boolean).join('%20')%3B%20if%20(txt)%20return%20txt%3B%20%7D%20if%20(el.getAttribute('aria-label'))%20return%20el.getAttribute('aria-label')%3B%20if%20(el.alt)%20return%20el.alt%3B%20if%20(el.title)%20return%20el.title%3B%20if%20(el.id)%20%7B%20const%20lbl%20%3D%20document.querySelector('label%5Bfor%3D%22'%20%2B%20el.id%20%2B%20'%22%5D')%3B%20if%20(lbl)%20return%20lbl.textContent.trim()%3B%20%7D%20if%20(el.placeholder)%20return%20el.placeholder%3B%20return%20''%3B%20%7D%20function%20getSemantics(target)%20%7B%20const%20s%20%3D%20%7B%7D%3B%20const%20role%20%3D%20target.getAttribute('role')%3B%20if%20(role)%20s.role%20%3D%20role%3B%20const%20name%20%3D%20getAccessibleName(target)%3B%20if%20(name)%20s.accessibleName%20%3D%20name%3B%20if%20(target.disabled)%20s.disabled%20%3D%20true%3B%20if%20(target.getAttribute('aria-hidden')%20%3D%3D%3D%20'true')%20s.ariaHidden%20%3D%20true%3B%20if%20(target.hasAttribute('aria-expanded'))%20s.ariaExpanded%20%3D%20target.getAttribute('aria-expanded')%20%3D%3D%3D%20'true'%3B%20if%20(target.hasAttribute('aria-pressed'))%20s.ariaPressed%20%3D%20target.getAttribute('aria-pressed')%3B%20if%20(target.checked)%20s.checked%20%3D%20true%3B%20if%20(target.required)%20s.required%20%3D%20true%3B%20if%20(target.readOnly)%20s.readOnly%20%3D%20true%3B%20const%20form%20%3D%20target.closest('form')%3B%20if%20(form)%20%7B%20s.formAction%20%3D%20form.action%20%7C%7C%20undefined%3B%20s.formMethod%20%3D%20form.method%20%7C%7C%20undefined%3B%20%7D%20if%20(target.formAction%20%26%26%20target.formAction%20!%3D%3D%20location.href)%20s.formAction%20%3D%20target.formAction%3B%20const%20inputs%20%3D%20target.tagName%20%3D%3D%3D%20'FORM'%20%3F%20target.querySelectorAll('input%2C%20select%2C%20textarea')%20%3A%20target.querySelectorAll('form%20input%2C%20form%20select%2C%20form%20textarea')%3B%20if%20(inputs.length)%20%7B%20s.formFields%20%3D%20%5B...inputs%5D.slice(0%2C%2020).map(inp%20%3D%3E%20%7B%20const%20f%20%3D%20%7B%20tag%3A%20inp.tagName.toLowerCase()%20%7D%3B%20if%20(inp.type%20%26%26%20inp.type%20!%3D%3D%20'text')%20f.type%20%3D%20inp.type%3B%20if%20(inp.name)%20f.name%20%3D%20inp.name%3B%20if%20(inp.placeholder)%20f.placeholder%20%3D%20inp.placeholder%3B%20const%20an%20%3D%20getAccessibleName(inp)%3B%20if%20(an)%20f.label%20%3D%20an%3B%20if%20(inp.required)%20f.required%20%3D%20true%3B%20return%20f%3B%20%7D)%3B%20%7D%20return%20Object.keys(s).length%20%3F%20s%20%3A%20undefined%3B%20%7D%20async%20function%20capture(target)%20%7B%20await%20fixCorsSheets()%3B%20const%20r%20%3D%20target.getBoundingClientRect()%3B%20const%20cleaned%20%3D%20cleanHTML(target)%3B%20const%20semantics%20%3D%20getSemantics(target)%3B%20const%20cap%20%3D%20%7B%20mode%3A%20captureMode%2C%20selector%3A%20selApprox(target)%2C%20tag%3A%20target.tagName.toLowerCase()%2C%20url%3A%20location.href%2C%20title%3A%20document.title%2C%20timestamp%3A%20new%20Date().toISOString()%2C%20innerText%3A%20cleaned.innerText%2C%20outerHTML%3A%20cleaned.html%2C%20rect%3A%20%7B%20x%3A%20Math.round(r.x)%2C%20y%3A%20Math.round(r.y)%2C%20width%3A%20Math.round(r.width)%2C%20height%3A%20Math.round(r.height)%2C%20%7D%2C%20computedStyles%3A%20getComputed(target)%2C%20cssRules%3A%20getRules(target)%2C%20%7D%3B%20if%20(semantics)%20cap.semantics%20%3D%20semantics%3B%20const%20pseudos%20%3D%20getPseudos(target)%3B%20if%20(pseudos)%20cap.pseudoElements%20%3D%20pseudos%3B%20const%20fonts%20%3D%20getUsedFonts(target)%3B%20if%20(fonts)%20cap.loadedFonts%20%3D%20fonts%3B%20const%20vw%20%3D%20window.innerWidth%2C%20vh%20%3D%20window.innerHeight%3B%20const%20vp%20%3D%20%7B%20width%3A%20vw%2C%20height%3A%20vh%2C%20mode%3A%20vw%20%3C%20768%20%3F%20'mobil l.style.width%20%3D%20r.width%20%2B%20'px'%3B%20hl.style.height%20%3D%20r.height%20%2B%20'px'%3B%20hlLabel.textContent%20%3D%20selApprox(t)%3B%20hoverEl%20%3D%20t%3B%20%7D%20function%20onClick(e)%20%7B%20if%20(panel.contains(e.target))%20return%3B%20e.preventDefault()%3B%20e.stopPropagation()%3B%20e.stopImmediatePropagation()%3B%20if%20(hoverEl)%20capture(hoverEl)%3B%20%7D%20function%20onKey(e)%20%7B%20if%20(e.key%20%3D%3D%3D%20'Escape')%20stop()%3B%20%7D%20function%20start()%20%7B%20picking%20%3D%20true%3B%20pickBtn.textContent%20%3D%20'Stop%20picking'%3B%20dot.style.animation%20%3D%20'chromecap-pulse%201.2s%20ease-in-out%20infinite'%3B%20document.body.appendChild(hl)%3B%20document.addEventListener('mousemove'%2C%20onMove%2C%20true)%3B%20document.addEventListener('click'%2C%20onClick%2C%20true)%3B%20document.addEventListener('keydown'%2C%20onKey%2C%20true)%3B%20%7D%20function%20stop()%20%7B%20picking%20%3D%20false%3B%20pickBtn.textContent%20%3D%20'Pick%20more%20elements'%3B%20dot.style.animation%20%3D%20''%3B%20hl.remove()%3B%20hl.style.display%20%3D%20'none'%3B%20document.removeEventListener('mousemove'%2C%20onMove%2C%20true)%3B%20document.removeEventListener('click'%2C%20onClick%2C%20true)%3B%20document.removeEventListener('keydown'%2C%20onKey%2C%20true)%3B%20%7D%20function%20destroy()%20%7B%20stop()%3B%20panel.remove()%3B%20style.remove()%3B%20document.removeEventListener('keydown'%2C%20onGlobalKey%2C%20true)%3B%20delete%20window.__chromeCap%3B%20%7D%20function%20onGlobalKey(e)%20%7B%20if%20(e.altKey%20%26%26%20e.code%20%3D%3D%3D%20'KeyP')%20%7B%20e.preventDefault()%3B%20e.stopPropagation()%3B%20picking%20%3F%20stop()%20%3A%20start()%3B%20%7D%20%7D%20document.addEventListener('keydown'%2C%20onGlobalKey%2C%20true)%3B%20pickBtn.onclick%20%3D%20()%20%3D%3E%20picking%20%3F%20stop()%20%3A%20start()%3B%20copyBtn.onclick%20%3D%20()%20%3D%3E%20%7B%20if%20(!out.value)%20return%3B%20const%20done%20%3D%20()%20%3D%3E%20%7B%20copyBtn.textContent%20%3D%20'Copied!'%3B%20setTimeout(()%20%3D%3E%20copyBtn.textContent%20%3D%20'Copy'%2C%201200)%3B%20%7D%3B%20const%20fallback%20%3D%20()%20%3D%3E%20%7B%20out.select()%3B%20document.execCommand('copy')%3B%20done()%3B%20%7D%3B%20if%20(navigator.clipboard%20%26%26%20navigator.clipboard.writeText)%20%7B%20navigator.clipboard.writeText(out.value).then(done%2C%20fallback)%3B%20%7D%20else%20fallback()%3B%20%7D%3B%20closeBtn.onclick%20%3D%20destroy%3B%20const%20style%20%3D%20el('style')%3B%20style.textContent%20%3D%20'%40keyframes%20chromecap-pulse%7B0%25%2C100%25%7Bopacity%3A1%3Btransform%3Ascale(1)%7D50%25%7Bopacity%3A.4%3Btransform%3Ascale(.8)%7D%7D'%3B%20document.head.appendChild(style)%3B%20document.body.appendChild(panel)%3B%20window.__chromeCap%20%3D%20%7B%20toggle%3A%20()%20%3D%3E%20picking%20%3F%20stop()%20%3A%20start()%2C%20destroy%20%7D%3B%20start()%3B%20%7D)()%3B
